## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Relevant Playwright specs added/updated
- [ ] Tenant isolation (`organization_id`) and RBAC/ABAC enforced on any new API route
- [ ] No secrets committed
